portrait: You favor wines defined by pronounced, invigorating acidity—the sharpness of a quality Brut Nature or the bright edge of aged Jura—over wines that settle into merely pleasant, softly rounded profiles. Your palette gravitates toward textural complexity, showing a distinct preference for the inherent structure of Chenin Blanc, valuing its ability to deliver honeysuckle aromatics alongside tangible acidity, while appreciating rustic elegance in Burgundy when it avoids being over-priced or overly structured by tannin. You dismiss straightforwardly labeled wines that lack discernible edge, while reserving your highest praise for wines that deliver genuine value by combining notable character (such as oxidative nuttiness or distinct natural funk) with admirable restraint.
